TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ngurus ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 23 buwan, 59 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Cou2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ngurus hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ngurus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ngurus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ngurus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ngurus hya' ga Tqwiy. tay mkyahu' na Ngurus hya' ga Qrahu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ŋurus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, ʦ~ʨou*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tqwij. taj mkjaħuʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa qraħu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ngurus ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 23 buwan, 59 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Cou2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ngurus hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ngurus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ngurus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ngurus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ngurus hya' ga Tqwiy. tay mkyahu' na Ngurus hya' ga Qrahu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ŋurus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, ʦ~ʨou*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa tqwij. taj mkjaħuʔ na ŋurus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa qraħu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
